# TML Agency

> TML Agency is a full-service digital marketing and branding agency based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. Founded in 2010, we serve 500+ businesses across Canada with SEO, Google Ads, branding, web development, social media marketing, and AI automation services.

## About
- Founded: 2010
- Location: Edmonton, AB, Canada
- Team: 70+ specialists
- Clients: 500+ brands served
- Retention: 98% client retention rate

## Services
- [SEO](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/seo)
- [Google Ads](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/google-ads)
- [Branding](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/branding)
- [Web Development](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/website-development)
- [Social Media Marketing](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/social-media)
- [Lead Generation](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/lead-generation)
- [Graphic Design](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/graphic-design)
- [Video Editing](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/video-editing)
- [AI Automation](https://townmedialabs.ca/services/ai-automation)
